name: Honey-Glazed Carrots -NHB
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup bourbon whiskey OR apple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over high heat, combine the honey, butter, bourbon and water.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Add the carrots.
4. Reduce the heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes, or until the liquid has reduced to a glaze and the carrots are tender.
[Note: This recipe makes approximately 4 servings. Nutrients per serving: Calories: 241 Sodium: 158 mg Carbohydrates: 26.7 g Protein: 1.14 g Cholesterol: 31.0 mg Dietary Fiber: 3.67 g Total Fat: 12.1 g Calories from Fat: 45%]
